what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG line icon depicting a megaphone using three stroked path shapes.
observations: The SVG uses viewBox="0 0 24 24" with width and height set to 24.
It has fill="none" and stroke="currentColor", allowing the icon color to inherit from its context.
Stroke styling is set to 1.5 width with rounded line caps and joins.
The drawing is composed of three path elements: the megaphone body, a handle-side rectangular detail, and a lower handle.
standouts: Simple geometric construction using path elements only.
conventions: Uses stroke-only line icon styling with no fill.
Uses rounded stroke caps and joins.
Does not include embedded title, desc, role, or aria attributes.
concerns: No embedded accessible label or description is present; accessibility depends on the consuming context.
notes: A compact currentColor SVG megaphone icon built from three stroked paths.
questions: Should accessibility metadata be embedded in the SVG or supplied by the component that renders it?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename and path indicate a megaphone icon asset, and the SVG content depicts a megaphone.
intention_signals: It appears intended to serve as a reusable megaphone/announcement icon that can inherit color and scale cleanly in interface contexts.
contribution: Provides a compact, theme-colored megaphone line icon with simple editable path geometry for a fused design asset ledger.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 currentColor SVG megaphone line icon composed of three rounded-stroke paths.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for a reusable announcement or megaphone icon asset in a design system.
